items.title: Counting token frequencies
items.scenario: You want the most common words across a corpus to inspect data quality.
items.explanation: Counter(words).most_common(10) tallies and ranks in two lines.

items.title: Grouping retrieved chunks by source
items.scenario: RAG results need to be grouped by the document they came from.
items.explanation: defaultdict(list) lets you append to groups[doc_id] without first checking if the key exists.

items.title: A rolling chat window
items.scenario: A chatbot should remember only the last 10 turns to stay within context limits.
items.explanation: deque(maxlen=10) automatically discards the oldest turn when a new one is appended.

items.title: Structured message objects
items.scenario: Chat messages need role, content and token count with readable repr and equality.
items.explanation: @dataclass Message gives __init__/__repr__/__eq__ for free; frozen=True makes config objects hashable.
